title: Airbus/Elytra Callouts
description: GPWS-style Elytra warning system with realistic callouts and terrain alerts
body:
Adds a realistic GPWS-like warning system for Elytra flight.

Features:
- Toggle every sound via modmenu (optional)
- Terrain warning with forward detection
- Sink rate and pull up warnings
- Stall detection
- Landing callouts (100–5)
- Realistic sound prioritization

Inspired by real Airbus GPWS systems.
